title: Create: Unbreakable Netherite Shovel
description: This mod basically adds a new tool, called: Unbreakable Netherite Shovel, which as the name says is unbreakable
body:
![Icon of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf8376731c21b491cc7a125d11951aab739403cf_0.webp)
# Create: Unbreakable Netherite Shovel
This mod simply adds a new variant of the shovel, an unbreakable one to be exact. The shovel as the name says is **unbreakable** it is made out of **gold** and some **netherite**.
![The actual recipe for it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d29148eefe823ee2e9d2b762eb2ec1f6764dc48a.png)

**Curseforge Version:** [Link (Click me)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-unbreakable-netherite-shovel)
